calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der stated that he received a consent from Kevin Merritt by fax with regard to the non pro rata distribution of the personal property and provided a copy to the Court. In addition, Mr. Der explained that Ms. Storm needed 24 hour care with one or two caregivers, that she had a lot of expenses, that his Client billed by the hour for Ms. Segal's services and that it would take at the most 5 hours to close the estate. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Y. Watts.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1555 43rd Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

There being no overbids, the sale was confirmed at $701,000 (an order for the same was signed in open court). An additional bond in the amount of $666,000 was required.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
